sc.political.s: FEC filings 2020-2024: Meta PAC donated 52% to Democrats, 48% to Republicans.
sc.dei.s: Published 2023 DEI report with named programs; $200M+ diversity/inclusion spending disclosed since 2020.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement or named pollution events on record; Scope 1/2 emissions disclosed; no science-based targets verified.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings; OSHA recordable incidents reported per standard disclosure; no major class-action settlements found.
sc.charity.s: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative pledged $120B+ for education, science, and health; exceeds 1% revenue threshold.
sc.guns.s: No firearms manufactured or sold; technology platform.
sc.privacy.s: FTC $5B settlement 2019; Cambridge Analytica breach 2018; multiple documented data breaches.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker ratio data not consistently disclosed; no verified 2024 ratio found.

charity.amt: Billions pledged via CZI over lifetime; ~$50M direct corporate donation noted in 2026
charity.focus: Biomedical research, AI, education, housing affordability

execPay.ratio: ~72:1 (other NEOs vs. median worker); CEO ratio atypical due to $1 base salary

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
